caption: The video consists of a static white background featuring the corporate branding for Manipal Hospitals. The logo, consisting of the text "manipalhospitals" in a sans-serif font, is positioned in two different locations on the screen. To the right of each main logo, the phrase "LIFE'S ON" is written in smaller, uppercase letters, followed by a small red cross icon. Across the frames, the visibility of these logos shifts. Initially, a blue-toned logo appears in the upper-left and lower-left areas of the screen. As the sequence progresses, the logo in the upper-left fades out while a blue-toned logo appears in the upper-right. Simultaneously, the logo in the lower-left fades out and is replaced by a grey-toned version of the logo in the lower-right. The overall effect is a transition of the branding elements across the white space.
